title: Lewis Hamilton and Max Verstappen deliver F1 future updates
summary:
Lewis Hamilton and Max Verstappen both addressed their futures in Formula 1 on media day ahead of this weekend's Canadian Grand Prix, as Fernando Alonso voiced his frustration at the power unit regulations.

F1's likely switch to a 60/40 power unit split was a major talking point in Montreal, with Verstappen being a fan of it while others, including Alonso, were not. Mercedes are a team with much focus due to its first major upgrades of 2026, while George Russell has insisted he is not under pressure to beat Kimi Antonelli.

Join RacingNews365's Ian Parkes and Nick Golding as they dissect Canadian GP media day!
